summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. There is no shared canonical for the whole shard, no security-sensitive signal, and close/fix/merge paths are disabled or blocked, so useful focused PRs stay open for normal maintainer review.

actions.reason: Best open candidate for the agent toolless tool-prep subfamily, but this inventory job cannot merge or repair it.
Related follow-up to the merged WebChat reconnect-send path; keep open for maintainer/author review rather than closing as superseded.
Independent feature PR needing normal maintainer technical review; not low-signal, duplicate, or safely closable.
Related overlapping maintainer PR in the toolless tool-prep family; keep open rather than close or choose a merge path in this inventory shard.
Independent focused bug-fix PR; keep open for maintainer review because technical correctness and failing checks cannot be resolved by this job.
Independent maintainer-owned provider fix; no close, merge, or fix mutation is allowed in this inventory job.
